Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I didn't expect to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Usually, people don't come back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 20 5 117}I honestly didn't expect you to come back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Nobody treats me like a normal person... Not even my friends or family.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}They all keep their distance and say, "Oh, what a poor soul."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}All they feel is pity and curiosity towards me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Sorry to disappoint them, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 0 25 25}Dying isn't so bad, is it? What's the point of dragging out your time in this world, anyhow?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 20 5 117}...You must have a hopelessness festering within as well, then. I can't remember a time without it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}So, aren't you afraid that my hopelessness might be contagious if you hang around me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...They say that necessity is the mother of our industrialized society.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And yet, fire does not realize that it's burning away. Not exactly foolishness, but sad nonetheless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm not sure I know how to describe it exactly, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}You don't look on me with pity the way everyone else does...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kamiki seems intrigued by me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Damn it... What did I do to deserve this body?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Kamiki,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
